repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Memorabilia, Movie Film, Newspapers, Photographs, Printed Materials.
did.abstract: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1947, Columbia University Ph.D. 1955.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dr. Joyce Brothers papers, #4254. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains letters from viewers, listeners, readers, and fans. The bulk of this correspondence is advice letters. For related correspondence, see individual series for Brothers' shows and publications.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Some titles may be supplied by previous archivists. Notes have been added to clarify contents of folders. Order has been maintained. Boxes 1-7 were labelled "Alpha Subject Work File." Boxes 8-12 were labelled "Farm File."

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: These boxes were removed from filing cabinets. Boxes 14-17 were kept in their original order with original titles. Boxes 18-20 were compiled by the archivist from miscellaneous boxes and files. Some of the folder titles for those boxes were created by the archivist. The filing cabinets were originally labelled "Book publishing, media tours, promos, luce, book review, books-scripts, agents (various) #1"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Consult Dr. Brothers" changed titles and is also referred to as "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Show" or "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Program" in the early years. It is unclear when exactly the name changed, but was clearly "Consult Dr. Brothers" in 1961. Documents that were not labelled with the show title were labelled as "Consult Dr. Brothers" for consistency. The show was picked up by NBC and later ABC (1961). It ran from 1959 to circa 1961 and preceded "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These notes likely relate to Consult Dr. Brothers, as they were found with related material, but may also contain information on "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers." Included are notes for redaction and censorship for the show from WEWS.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposed program with Dr. Brothers dramatic presentation of cases based on actual letter. This show was 20-25 minutes. Brothers was represented by Lester Lewis Associates. This is a different show than "Consult Dr. Brothers"/"The Dr. Joyce Brothers show." It was not filmed and did not air, though a promo was shot.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Brothers possessed multiple sets of films of Tell Me, Dr. Brothers. The sets were labelled A, B, and C, though many canisters were unlabelled. The best copy of each episode was digitized, regardless of which set it came from. The dates on original canisters do not match the date of filming, but may be air dates or dates that a film copy was made.
